pos_examples: Now, prepare policy eligibility for deployment group frame_9 with release yew.
Once you are done, please run validation suite object_50 for deployment group frame_9 on release yew.
First, mark release yew as approved by operator role obj_15 for service component kumquat_8 and dependent service dress_red and then register release yew as a registered release.
The next step is to bind approval policy roof_11 to the variant of release yew.
